steps.description: Personalized care planning tailored to your procedure and recovery needs.
Dedicated RN assistance from surgical center pickup through recovery.
Ongoing private nurse support and coordination as needed.

packages.name: Overnight Recovery Support
packages.hours: Private RN monitoring and care through the night for added safety and comfort.

reviews.quote: “From the moment I was discharged, I felt completely safe and cared for. Having a private RN by my side gave me absolute peace of mind. This is recovery redefined.”
reviews.name: Client, Miami

reviews.quote: “The level of attention and professionalism was beyond anything I expected. Every detail was handled seamlessly — medications, monitoring, comfort, and communication with my surgeon.”
reviews.name: Post-Operative Client

reviews.quote: “Aesthetic Aftercare felt like hospital-level care with five-star hospitality. Calm, discreet, and incredibly reassuring during a vulnerable time.”
reviews.name: Private Recovery Client

cta_section.title: Aesthetic Aftercare Because recovery should feel beautiful.
